entities.name: File organization
entities.context: System for organizing and naming files using content_type and status priority

entities.name: Knowledge base
entities.context: System for entries and articles prioritized by content_type

entities.name: Detection Priority
entities.context: Framework for auto-selecting emojis based on priority values (10-100)

entities.name: content_type
entities.context: Primary classification dimension for categorizing content (research, strategy, documentation, etc.)

entities.name: status
entities.context: Classification dimension indicating state: failed, in_progress, completed, scheduled

entities.name: action
entities.context: Classification category for operations: deployment, sync, organization

entities.name: relationship
entities.context: Classification category for connections between items (linked)

entities.name: Emoji classification system
entities.context: Technique using emojis as visual markers for content categorization

relationships.context: content_type is first priority for file organization
status is second priority for file organization
content_type is the priority order for knowledge base entries
status items range from priority 10 (completed) to 100 (failed)
Detection Priority drives the emoji auto-selection logic
